title: Local Dry-Run Envelope Export
objective: Add a local-only JSON export for the browser approval dry-run envelope on /pm-review/import-intake without sending a live approval POST or creating an approval row.
scope: Add an Export Dry Run Envelope action to the existing Local Approval Submission Dry Run panel.
Download the same mock-only approval envelope as JSON.
Refresh the on-screen dry-run preview when exporting.
Extend the focused Playwright smoke to prove the downloaded envelope and zero mutation requests.
Accept the Desktop Codex Relay review-burden closeout, first NETA scout, and NETA source-map/artifact-backlog closeout while keeping TCC parked.
not_allowed: No Supabase, Render, Vercel, or Olares action.
No secret access or secret rotation.
No backend route or mutation route change.
No project import, workpackage rows, task rows, apparatus rows, assignment, schedule, status, durable field record, production tracking, workbook macro, or workbook writeback.
No service, auth, DNS, ingress, or control-plane widening.

live_write_gate.required_phrase: I explicitly admit PM Lane 142 live approval POST and first approval-row creation for the current Project Miner Temp Power import candidate.
live_write_gate.note: This phrase was not present for PM Lane 143, so the lane remains local dry-run export only.

validation_steps: rg -n "PM Lane 143|Export Dry Run Envelope|approval-dry-run-envelope|Relay closeout|NETA Topic Spine|TCC remains parked" PROJECT_STATUS.md docs/operations ops/agents apps/operations-web
validation_result: PASS: operations-web typecheck passed, operations-web production build passed, focused PM import-intake Playwright smoke passed with 1 passed after resequencing the smoke after build, guardrail search confirmed PM Lane 143 plus Relay/NETA/TCC orchestration language, and scoped diff check passed.
sidecar_result: Desktop Codex Relay review-burden proof, first NETA scout, and NETA source-map/artifact-backlog closeout all returned READY_FOR_JASON_DECISION and stayed within their bounded read-only/one-handoff authority.
next_recommended_lane: PM lane may continue local operator-review ergonomics or await explicit PM Lane 142 live-write admission; Desktop Codex next non-PM decision is whether to admit the NETA Topic Spine Comparative Audit while keeping TCC parked.
